mapper.select: select plaza_key, label, description from home_plaza_tab where enabled = 1 order by sort_weight asc, id asc
select plaza_key, category_name from home_plaza_category where enabled = 1 order by plaza_key asc, sort_weight asc, id asc
select s.user_id, p.verified, coalesce(p.nickname, s.nickname) as nickname, p.avatar_url from home_user_summary s left join user_profile p on p.user_id = s.user_id where s.user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select user_id, stat_label, stat_value from home_user_stat where user_id = #{userId} order by sort_weight asc, id asc
select user_id, title, partner, category, meet_time, location, status from home_pending_meet where user_id = #{userId} and active = 1 order by id desc limit 1
